steps.title: Find the cube volume
steps.content:
The cube edge length is $72$, so its volume is
$$72^3=373{,}248$$

steps.title: Find the sphere volume
steps.content:
The sphere radius is $36$, so its volume is
$$\frac{4}{3}\pi(36)^3=62{,}208\pi$$
This is about $195{,}432$ cubic inches.

steps.title: Subtract the sphere volume
steps.content: Subtract the sphere volume from the cube volume and round to the nearest cubic inch. $$373{,}248-195{,}432=177{,}816$$ The answer is A.
